---
name: Propose a new work
about: Add documentation for a new workflow
title: ''
labels: 'proposal'
assignees: ''

---

**What is the workflow you are suggesting?**
A concise description of the standard

**What would be the benefit to the Funding Service of adopting this workflow?**
This could be the mitigation of risks, or the improvement of other aspects, for example quality or speed of delivery

**Who may use this workflow, and how would they use it?**
For example, is this workflow isolated to a handful of teams / professions? Would this be used in PRs, or on Builds, or in some other way?

**Additional information**
Add any other information you think would be useful here

**Please confirm the below**

- [ ] I have looked through our existing workflows and think this is not covered elsewhere
- [ ] I have checked through the open issues on the repository and this workflow has not already been suggested
